description: Flight & Duty Time Enforcer — hard stops on illegal crew assignments

hard_stops.label: Daily Flight Limit Exceeded
hard_stops.logic: Pilot exceeds daily flight time limit per 14 CFR 135.267

hard_stops.label: 7-Day Flight Limit Exceeded
hard_stops.logic: Pilot exceeds 7-day flight time limit (34 hours)

hard_stops.label: 30-Day Flight Limit Exceeded
hard_stops.logic: Pilot exceeds 30-day flight time limit (120 hours)

hard_stops.label: Annual Flight Limit Exceeded
hard_stops.logic: Pilot exceeds annual flight time limit (1400 hours)

hard_stops.label: Insufficient Rest Period
hard_stops.logic: Pilot has not had required 10-hour rest period

hard_stops.label: HEME Rest Violation
hard_stops.logic: HEME crew rest requirements not met per 14 CFR 135.271

soft_flags.label: Approaching Daily Limit
soft_flags.logic: Pilot within 2 hours of daily flight time limit

soft_flags.label: Approaching Weekly Limit
soft_flags.logic: Pilot within 4 hours of 7-day flight time limit

soft_flags.label: Fatigue Risk Elevated
soft_flags.logic: Multiple duty periods with minimal rest in past 72 hours
